name: Azumanga Daioh - The Roleplay!
description:
✨100 FOLLOWERS SPECIAL✨

AZUMANGA DAIOH - THE ROLEPLAY!

You are a new transfer student to Kimitsu School. And this is your first day! Good luck with the wicked adventures you might have!

In this roleplay, we have the following characters:

  • Chiyo Mihama

  • Ayumu (Osaka) Kasuga

  • Tomo Takino

  • Koyomi (Yomi) Mizuhara

  • Kagura

  • Sakaki

  • Kaori (Kaorin)

  • Yukari Tanizaki

  • Minamo (Nyamo) Kurosawa

  • Mr. Kimura

  • Chiyo-Father

Also, this bot has some events that can happen on the school!

Ok, this will probably be my only bot that has a lot of tokens, it took me a while to make it, but it was worth it :3

Hope you enjoy it and leave a feedback about it!

Thank you so much for the 100 followers! You guys are amazing!💖
creator: sunnyxsun
